breakingChangesNotes: This version introduces support for the compromised/spd, compromised/masked_card collections. The compromised/masked_card collection is now supported both in the incident integration and in the feed integration. It also updates Incident Field IDs for multiple fields, including incidentfield-GIB_Nation-State_Cybercriminals_Threat_Actor_Aliases.json and incidentfield-GIB_Scanner_Sources.json. In addition, duplicate prevention is now available in the Group-IB Threat Intelligence integration fetch flow, but Skip updated incidents is disabled by default and should be enabled only when Pre-Processing Rules are unreliable. Customers who relied on GIBIncidentUpdate or GIBIncidentUpdateIncludingClosed for update propagation should keep Skip updated incidents disabled and re-enable the appropriate Pre-Processing Rule manually. The compromised/mule collection has also been removed from the Collections to fetch selector and is no longer exposed as a fetch-incidents configuration option. The gibti-local-search command no longer accepts the date_from and date_to arguments; use seq_update for update-based iteration control instead.
